name: itsolpowers
description: ITSOL engineering skills and Claude Code subagents for task intake, functional planning, subagent execution, TDD, implementation, debugging, review, security, infrastructure, and production readiness.

interface.shortDescription: ITSOL workflows, planning gates, subagents, TDD, and review.
interface.longDescription: ITSOL Powers provides Codex skills for routing engineering tasks across functional planning, approved business and technical plans, subagent-driven execution, TDD, implementation, debugging, self-review, security review, infrastructure design, deployment readiness, and incident analysis using ITSOL best-practice documents.
defaultPrompt: Use ITSOL Powers to classify this task and choose the right skills.
For functional work, require an approved Business Plan and Technical Plan before implementation.
For subagent-driven work, split tasks, set concurrency, review each implementation with a separate subagent, and commit reviewed slices.
Use ITSOL TDD workflow before changing production code.
Review this change against ITSOL security and infrastructure practices.
Debug this issue using ITSOL task and incident workflows.
